title: RideBattle Lib
description: Made☆In☆Haste Rider System for easier Kamen Rider Mods development on NeoForge
body:
# RideBattleLib - Kamen Rider System for Minecraft
Note: This is a library mod and does not change anything of the game on its own!

"Cyclone! Joker! Now, count up your sins!"
Experience authentic Kamen Rider transformations in Minecraft!

## 🎯 What is RideBattleLib?

~~A Made☆In☆Haste Rider System~~

RideBattleLib is a library that enables mod developers to create custom Kamen Rider experiences in Minecraft. With this framework, developers can implement:

Authentic transformation sequences - Insert items, turn drivers, and shout "Henshin!"

Dynamic form systems - Create forms based on belt items like Build's Full Bottles

Special abilities - Implement rider-specific skills and finishers

Penalty mechanics - Dramatic forced detransformations at low HP

## ✨ Key Features
### For Players

🧩 Equip driver belts and transform into powerful riders

⚡ Insert items into belt slots to unlock different forms

🔮 Switch between forms during combat

💥 Experience dramatic "penalty" detransformations

✨ Unleash special rider skills with intuitive controls

### For Developers

🛠️ Easy-to-use API for creating custom rider systems

🎭 Event-driven architecture for animations and effects

🌐 Built-in network synchronization

📦 Lightweight skill system implementation

🚀 Dynamic form generation for complex combinations

## 🎮 Player Experience

Equip a rider driver (belt)

- Insert items into belt slots

- Transform with a key press or item use

- Switch forms by changing belt items

- Unleash skills with dedicated controls

- Detransform manually or through dramatic penalties!

## ⚙️ Technical Details

- Minecraft Version: 1.21.1

- Loader: NeoForge

- License: MIT

# 👉 For Mod Developers

Want to create your own Kamen Rider mod? Full documentation, examples, and source code are available on GitHub:

[The English Doc](https://github.com/Junye-666/RideBattleLib_NeoForge_1.21.1/blob/master/README_en.md)

and

[中文页面](https://github.com/Junye-666/RideBattleLib_NeoForge_1.21.1/tree/master)

Explore our detailed examples:

Basic transformation system

Dynamic form generation

Skill implementation

Custom animation integration

## 🌟 Why Choose RideBattleLib?

✅ Designed specifically for Kamen Rider gameplay

✅ Actively maintained and updated

✅ Lightweight and performant

✅ Extensive event system for customization

✅ Open source with permissive license

Bring the excitement of Kamen Rider transformations to your Minecraft mods today!

"Henshin!" - Start building your Rider system now!
